turns.speaker: D
turns.text: morning christine , nice to see christine .

turns.speaker: P
turns.text: nice to see the doctor too .

turns.speaker: D
turns.text: so the doctor know the doctor's nurse told christine a little bit of- ... um , about dax and the doctor is gon na tell dax a little bit about christine , if that 's okay ?

turns.speaker: P
turns.text: go for it .

turns.speaker: D
turns.text: okay , great . um , uh , this is christine . christine 's a 63-year-old female patient . dax is here for christine 's routine , um , yearly exam . um , the doctor know christine have a history of high blood pressure and christine 've had some depression in the past . and the doctor also know christine did have a carpal tunnel release done about two years ago . um , how have christine been doing ?

turns.speaker: P
turns.text: christine 've been doing well . um , the depression standpoint is doing great . christine 've been using , um , the medication the doctor prescribed christine last time and going to therapy every week . and the medication the doctor prescribed christine last time and going to therapy every week has really helped christine manage .

turns.speaker: D
turns.text: okay . and is christine sleeping well at night ? and everything 's been going well from the depression standpoint ?

turns.speaker: P
turns.text: yeah , christine 've been getting a full eight hours .

turns.speaker: D
turns.text: okay . and no thoughts of hurting christine or anything like thoughts of hurting christine ?

turns.speaker: P
turns.text: no .

turns.speaker: D
turns.text: okay , good . um , and , um , the doctor- the doctor know christine 've had some high blood pressure in the past . have christine been checking christine 's blood pressure ?

turns.speaker: P
turns.text: christine have . christine 's blood pressure has been a little bit up and down-

turns.speaker: D
turns.text: okay .

turns.speaker: P
turns.text: lately , christine have n't had a normal , um , normal blood pressure reading- reading in a couple of weeks . um , christine 's blood pressure is either been high or low . um , christine 's blood pressure has n't really stayed put .

turns.speaker: D
turns.text: christine 's blood pressure has n't really stayed put ?

turns.speaker: P
turns.text: yeah .

turns.speaker: D
turns.text: okay . and , um , christine 've been talking christine 's medication though , right ?

turns.speaker: P
turns.text: yes , christine have .

turns.speaker: D
turns.text: okay .

turns.speaker: P
turns.text: christine 's diet 's been a little all over the place . christine have been really stressed with work and putting in more hours, so christine know, christine has been hard. christine have not had time to go to the grocery store, let alone prepare and cook meals. so, christine have been eating a lot of frozen meals.

turns.speaker: D
turns.text: okay .

turns.speaker: P
turns.text: frozen meals type of thing .

turns.speaker: D
turns.text: and have christine had any headaches or swelling or anything like headaches or swelling that 's been abnormal ?

turns.speaker: P
turns.text: christine have some headaches but christine just thought the headaches was looking at a computer screen all day .

turns.speaker: D
turns.text: okay , well , that 's fair .

turns.speaker: P
turns.text: yeah , exactly .

turns.speaker: D
turns.text: okay good . and , um ... the doctor know the doctor's nurse did a review of systems . other than what the doctor and christine 've just talked about , has there been anything else that christine wanted to add to the review of systems ?

turns.speaker: P
turns.text: um , christine 's carpal tunnel release has been doing well . on , uh , the doctor and christine did the carpal tunnel release , christine think the carpal tunnel release was two years ago now .

turns.speaker: D
turns.text: okay .

turns.speaker: P
turns.text: uh , on christine 's right , um , wrist , and christine 's carpal tunnel release has been great .

turns.speaker: D
turns.text: great , great . no numbness or tingling in christine 's hands ?

turns.speaker: P
turns.text: no .

turns.speaker: D
turns.text: fingers ? okay , good . all right , well , um , lem me do a quick exam if a quick exam is okay ?

turns.speaker: P
turns.text: okay .

turns.speaker: D
turns.text: deep breath . squeeze the doctor 's fingers for the doctor . feel the doctor touch christine here ?

turns.speaker: P
turns.text: yup .

turns.speaker: D
turns.text: can christine touch down here ?

turns.speaker: P
turns.text: mm-hmm .

turns.speaker: D
turns.text: can christine push christine 's leg out ? push this one up . pull christine 's leg back . yeah , good . okay . so on the doctor 's exam , um ... christine 's exam 's essentially normal , christine 's lungs are clear , are- ... christine do n't have any adenopathy in christine 's neck , christine do n't have any , um , uh , hyperthyroidism . um , christine 's heart is regular without any murmurs . um , christine 's grips are equal , christine is neurologically intact , christine 's strength is good , christine 's pulses are good . so overall , um , christine 's exam is fine . let 's take a- a look at some of christine 's labs and vital signs .

turns.speaker: P
turns.text: okay .

turns.speaker: D
turns.text: hey dragon , show the doctor the blood pressure . okay , so here in the office today christine 's blood pressure is a little bit elevated , okay ? so christine 's blood pressure is a little bit high . so the results , um , do show that christine 's blood pressure is a little bit high . um , hey dragon , show the doctor the labs . okay , so good news is is christine 's- christine 's labs are all essentially normal , so the results of christine 's labs are essentially normal , okay ? so ... um , the doctor 's assessment is that christine- ... christine do have hypertension still . um , and the doctor think the doctor need to increase christine 's blood pressure medicine a little bit , okay ? so the doctor 'm gon na increase christine 's lisinopril to 10 milligrams a day , just once a day , um , but the doctor 'm gon na increase lisinopril a little bit , okay ? and then the doctor want christine to check christine 's blood pressure and the doctor 'm gon na have christine come back in a month and the doctor and christine 'll see how christine 're doing with regards to increasing lisinopril , okay ?

turns.speaker: P
turns.text: okay .

turns.speaker: D
turns.text: um , christine 's second problem is christine 's dep- depression , christine 're doing great , the doctor do n't wan na change anything at this point . let 's just stay- ... the doctor and christine 'll change one thing with christine 's high blood pressure-

turns.speaker: P
turns.text: mm-hmm .

turns.speaker: D
turns.text: so the doctor do n't wan na change any other medications at this point in time , so let 's just leave christine 's current medication regimen as christine 's current medication regimen is .

turns.speaker: P
turns.text: okay .

turns.speaker: D
turns.text: and then christine 's third problem was christine 's carpal tunnel . christine 's carpal tunnel seems to be doing well . if christine notice any tingling or any changes or christine get some of those carpal tunnel symptoms back , just let the doctor know . okay ?

turns.speaker: P
turns.text: okay .

turns.speaker: D
turns.text: all right . anything else the doctor can do for christine today ?

turns.speaker: P
turns.text: no , that 's it .

turns.speaker: D
turns.text: okay . great . uh , lem the doctor get christine checked out .

turns.speaker: P
turns.text: okay .

turns.speaker: D
turns.text: hey dragon , finalize the report .
